creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
Committed, thanks!

The patch you attached here didn't delete any patch files.  Not sure
how you generated it.  If you delete files make sure to use `svn rm` instead
of just `rm`, so that svn knows you want to delete it.

But files/patch-src_CMakeLists.txt needs to stay anyway to fix the
build on FreeBSD 10.3 (see the top of the patch as to why) and to
install man pages into the correct location.

If you want to get rid of it in the future consider sending it to
upstream.
